svg.text: Personal Loans · India · Build Plan v3 · End-to-End Pipeline
Phase 0 — Foundation + Data Assets + Annotation Pipeline (Weeks 1–2)
PAN · Aadhaar · Salary Slip · Bank Stmt
Form 16 · ITR · GST Return · Offer Letter
Generator JSON → BIO labels + bbox → 10,500 training samples
Both must pass before Phase 1a model training begins
PAN · Aadhaar · Salary Slips (3 months) · Bank Statement (6 months)
Preprocess (deskew · deblur · Sauvola threshold) → PaddleOCR + Surya → LayoutLMv3 classify
Qwen2.5-VL field extraction (ANLS gate) · Donut fallback for low-confidence structured forms
NSDL PAN verify + UIDAI Aadhaar OTP eKYC (api_authoritative — overrides document extract)
BGE-M3 cross-match: name ≥ 0.85 · DOB exact · PAN exact · address ≥ 0.70
Source-trust reconciliation: Form 16 (0.90) · ITR (0.85) · Bank credits (0.75) · Salary slip (0.65)
Salary credit detection: recurring ±5 days, CV < 0.15, 4 of last 6 months
FOIR = (existing EMIs + proposed EMI) ÷ verified monthly income
Also: disposable income · liquidity score · cashflow stability · financial stress score (LightGBM)
Score 300–900 · active loans · overdue accounts · DPD 90+ flag · Experian fallback
Layer 1: KYC hard gates (pan_inactive, aadhaar_otp_failed, format_invalid)
Layer 2: Credit hard gates (CIBIL < 650, DPD 90+, overdue accounts)
Layer 3: FOIR > 0.60 or income < minimum → hard reject
Layer 4: Soft flags → REVIEW · Layer 5: XGBoost ensemble → APPROVE / REVIEW / REJECT
Every output field traced via EvidenceChain → SourceLocation → document_id (MinIO) + bounding box coordinates
Phase 2 — Expand Depth: Self-Employed + Full Identity + Fraud (Weeks 9–12)
Document forgery rules (metadata, font, MRZ, Verhoeff, CIN via MCA21)
GraphSAGE node classification · Isolation Forest + AutoEncoder behavioural anomaly
Nodes: Person · PAN · Aadhaar · Phone · Email · Device · Employer · BankAccount · Address
Detects: device rings · PAN farming · shell employer · address inconsistency rings
Full salaried + self-employed pipeline validated before Phase 3
LIME token heatmap overlay on source document
Top red flags + 2 questions for human reviewer
Queue view (risk score sorted) · Document viewer with bounding-box field highlights
Decision panel: system recommendation + override + mandatory reason code + notes
Audit view: full EvidenceChain per figure + SHAP bar chart + copilot narrative
Reviewer overrides → retraining dataset → quarterly model update trigger
Explicit consent before every API call
KFS with APR upfront · NACH/e-NACH mandate · Disbursement to verified account only · 3-day cooling-off period
RBAC (6 roles) · Rate limiting (Redis) · p95 < 8s · OWASP Top 10 · pip-audit + bandit in CI
All services: AWS ap-south-1 (Mumbai) / Azure India Central — RBI data localisation enforced in CI
Full-spectrum personal loan onboarding — India compliant
Retraining: weekly scheduled + on-demand drift alert · Staging → prod gate on holdout F1
LOIP Build Plan v3 · Personal Loans India · 18-week roadmap · IBaseIT
